questions.question: What does Paul instruct the Corinthians to do on the first day of every week?
options: Set aside money for the collection
questions.answer: Set aside money for the collection

questions.question: What city was Paul staying in when he wrote this letter?

Be on the alert. Stand firm in the _____. Be courageous. Be strong.
